scripts.postinstall: npm --prefix log-view-back install && npm --prefix log-view-front install
scripts.dev: USE_MOCK=true concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm --prefix log-view-back run start:dev" "npm --prefix log-view-front run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix log-view-back run build && npm --prefix log-view-front run build
scripts.test: npm --prefix log-view-back run test && npm --prefix log-view-front run test
scripts.lint: npm --prefix log-view-back run lint && npm --prefix log-view-front run lint
